sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102879" key="teknosporiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεκνο-σπορικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n102879.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">favourable to the begetting of children,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(1).179</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
